Required ImGui Files
====================

Download ImGui v1.91.8+ from https://github.com/ocornut/imgui/releases

Place these files from the imgui/ directory into this folder:

Required core files:
- imgui.h
- imgui.cpp
- imgui_draw.cpp
- imgui_tables.cpp
- imgui_widgets.cpp
- imgui_internal.h
- imgui_memory_editor.h (optional)
- imstb_rectpack.h
- imstb_textedit.h
- imstb_truetype.h

Required backends (place in this directory too):
- imgui_impl_dx11.h
- imgui_impl_dx11.cpp
- imgui_impl_win32.h
- imgui_impl_win32.cpp

Also copy imconfig.h from the imgui/ directory.
